---
id: app-list-by-organization
title: "Get list of the apps for an organization"
description: "List all the available apps owned by a given organization. [Find the organization URL](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/team-management/organizations/org-url/) of the organisations you are part of; be aware that the endpoint will not return any apps if the authenticated account is not a member of the given organisation."
sidebar_label: "Get list of the apps for an organization"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get list of the apps for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/organizations/{org-slug}/apps"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the available apps owned by a given organization. [Find the organization URL](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/team-management/organizations/org-url/) of the organisations you are part of; be aware that the endpoint will not return any apps if the authenticated account is not a member of the given organisation.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
